title: agropyron semicostatum var. ciliare

The plant's flowers and seeds are also utilized in traditional medicine, with the flowers containing coumarins and the seeds containing unsaturated fatty acids and phenolic compounds. side_effects: Agropyron semicostatum var. ciliare can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal problems, allergic reactions, and skin irritation.
